title: Module 1
content:
8051 microcontrollers. Review-Basics of Computer Architecture: Basic
block diagram of a computer, System bus and components, RISC and CISC
.architectures, Von Neumann and Harvard architecture,
8051
microcontrollers:
Difference
between
microprocessor
and
microcontroller architecture, 8051 architecture, Register organization - special
function registers,
Memory organization 8051 microcontrollers: Instruction set- Arithmetic,
Data transfer, Control
transfer, Bit- oriented and Data exchange instructions (familiarization only,
not for exams), Addressing modes

title: Module 2
content:
8051 microcontroller Programming and Peripherals.
Timers/Counters- TMOD and TCON registers,
Serial Communication-SBUF, SCON, PCON registers and their functions
(details of different modes of operation not included), Interrupts in 8051- Timer
flag interrupt, Serial port interrupt, external interrupts and interrupt priority
Interfacing of peripherals – LED, LCD, ADC, DAC, LM35 temperature sensor,
7 segment LED (embedded C programming)

title: Module 3
content:
Embedded Systems Overview and introduction to OS
Introduction to Embedded Systems: Definition, Features, applications of
embedded systems in Robotics (examples only) Embedded System
Architecture: HW - Processor, Controller, SoC, Memory, Peripherals; SW -
Application, Middleware, OS, Device Drivers, Tool chain- Assembler,
Interpreter, Compiler, Linker,
Loader, Debugger
Embedded system design process: Requirement Analysis, Specification
Development, HW & SW Co-Design and Development, Module Integration,
Testing. (2 hours)
Introduction to OS:
Embedded Operating system basic concepts: Functional layers in a computer
system, Kernel Functions (Overview only), Tasks/ Processes: definition, five
states of a process/task, RTOS – definition, comparison of General Purpose OS
and Real Time OS (3 hours)

title: Module 4
content:
Embedded System Board Study, communication protocols and IoT.
Embedded System Board Study (Arduino Uno):
Arduino Uno Board: Board Study (Board level Block schematic) - Chip
(Features only - architecture not needed), GPIO, Memory, familiarization of
Arduino IDE (2 hours)
Programming: Sample code for LED and Switch, DC motor, Stepper motor
control (2 hours)
Internet of Things (IoT): An Introduction toInternet of Things (overview
only): Basic components of IoT- Building blocks of IoT, IoT Application
framework, The Internet Gateway, Edge IT, IoT Service Providers, IoT
Infrastructure, IoT Development service, Comparison of M2M and IoT
technology. (2 hours)
Role of cloud technology in IoT computing: Definition of cloud computing,
types of cloud services (examples for various types only), Need of cloud
computing in IoT applications (1 hour)
Communication Protocols: UART, I2C, SPI and USB (2 hours)
